title: OECD-panel real GDP per capita, indexed to 1930 (=1.0)
subtitle: Pop-weighted mean ratio 2018/1930 = 6.66x · 18/18 countries clear Keynes's 4x lower bound.

annotations.label: Keynes (1930) projected 4-8x growth in per-capita output by ~2030. Maddison MPD2020 ends in 2018. Pop-weighted mean ratio = 6.66x; equal-weighted mean = 7.34x; median = 6.40x.
